name: @clickhouse/clickhouse-test-runner
description: Node.js port of ClickHouse/clickhouse-java tests/clickhouse-client harness

scripts.build: npm run build:rowbinary && rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && chmod +x dist/main.js
scripts.//build:rowbinary: The in-repo @clickhouse/rowbinary skill is linked via file: (not a workspace, so it stays out of the root install/lint/test sweeps and keeps its own standalone CI). Its dist is gitignored, so build it here — the test runner is the last workspace built, so packages/* (datatype-parser) are already compiled when the skill's tsc resolves them.
